use_cases: Displaying time-series data with an interactive area chart for trend analysis
Showing statistical metrics with animated count-up effects and trend indicators
Monitoring KPIs with customizable time period filtering
Comparing performance metrics with visual trend representations
Building analytics dashboards with incident tracking and detailed metrics
ai_summary: A comprehensive analytics dashboard component featuring a Reaviz area chart with gradient fills, animated statistical cards showing incident counts and trends, and detailed metrics with icons. Uses framer-motion for entrance animations and react-countup for number animations. Designed for displaying temporal data with supporting KPIs and trend comparisons across selectable time periods.
